step: Given I am on the login page
When I enter a valid username and password
When I click the login button
Then I should be redirected to the dashboard
When I enter invalid credentials
Then I should see an authentication error message
When I attempt login with empty credentials
Then the login button should remain disabled
When I logout from the application
Then I should be redirected to the login page
Given I am on the product page
When I search for a product
Then search results should be displayed
When I clear the search field
Then all products should be visible
When I apply a price filter
Then products should be sorted by price ascending
When I select a product from the list
Then product details page should be displayed
Then product title should be visible
Given I have added a product to the cart
When I open the cart page
Then the cart should contain the selected product
When I remove the product from the cart
Then the cart should be empty
When I update the product quantity
Then the cart total should update accordingly
When I proceed to checkout
Then I should be redirected to the checkout page
Then cart badge count should increase
Then cart summary should display correct subtotal
Then applicable taxes should be calculated
When I continue shopping
Then I should return to product listing page
Then the cart icon should be visible in header
Given I am on the checkout page
When I enter valid shipping information
When I select a payment method
When I confirm the order
Then the order confirmation page should be displayed
Then an order number should be generated
When I cancel the checkout process
Then I should be redirected back to the cart page
Then payment should be processed successfully
Then payment failure message should be displayed
When I enter invalid shipping information
Then validation message should appear for required fields
When I apply a discount code
Then discount should be applied to the total amount
Then final total amount should be displayed correctly
